follower.en: Glad to see ya pullin' your weight around here!

brokenhorn_follower.en: You should really get that horn looked at.
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 你应该找大夫看看那个角。

generic.en: Yeesh, uh... nice whale?

fem_puppet.en: She doesn't look none too happy.

generic.en: I'll take this as a sign.

flowersalad.en: I guess a bunch of petals count as food.
flowersalad.trans: 我猜几片花瓣也算食物吧。

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: I'll have this all set up in a jiffy.

steeringwheel.en: I'm ready for a sea adventure.

knight.en: Incredible! Let me look at those gears!
knight.trans: 太精彩了！让我看看这些装置！

turf_road.trans: 那是一块建有道路的地。

mast_item.en: I can't wait to build that. I love hoisting things.
mast_item.trans: 我等不及要建好它了。我最喜欢把东西升起来。

book_birds.en: I was never much of a book learner.
book_birds.trans: 我向来不怎么喜欢读书。

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: Time to see if my Carrat's up to snuff.
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 该看看我的胡萝卜鼠是什么分量了。

barnacle.en: Took a bit of elbow grease to harvest 'em.
barnacle.trans: 花了点力气收割了它们。

lureplant.en: That doesn't look right at all.

megaflare.en: If I'm gonna start somethin', I'd better be ready to finish it.
megaflare.trans: 既然起了头，我就得收好尾。

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: It's nothin' to crow about, but it ain't half bad!
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 虽然没必要吹嘘，但是样子还是挺漂亮！

drumstick.en: Can't say a raw drumstick sounds too appealing.
drumstick.trans: 生鸡腿听起来可不诱人。

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: Pretty sure putting it at that height is a safety violation.
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 我非常肯定，把它放在那个高度是违反安全规定的。

mask_mirrorhat.en: Why do I feel like it's lookin' at me?
mask_mirrorhat.trans: 为什么我觉得它在看我？

merm_tool.en: Should get the job done... I hope.
merm_tool.trans: 应该能完成任务……希望吧。

support_pillar_scaffold.en: Looks like there's some buildin' to be done!
support_pillar_scaffold.trans: 看来还有一些建设工作要做！

burning.en: I knew that thing looked like a fire hazard waiting to happen...
burning.trans: 我断定那东西是一个随时会发生的火灾隐患……

has_item_light.en: Hey, a lot of hard work went into growing that thing!
has_item_light.trans: 嘿，为了种这个东西付出了很多辛勤的工作！

generic.en: What is this, a county fair?

tillweedsalve.en: Glad to have found a use for those weeds.
tillweedsalve.trans: 很高兴为这些杂草找到了用武之地。

archive_orchestrina_main.en: Some mighty complicated engineering went into this.
archive_orchestrina_main.trans: 这东西经过了强大的工程制造。

hermitcrabtea_petals.en: This'll set your head on straight.
hermitcrabtea_petals.trans: 这杯能把你脑子拧回正档位。

watertree_pillar.en: Yeesh, look at the size of that thing!

generic.en: We can pick it if we can get close enough.

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.en: Wow. Can't even see the weld joints.
multiplayer_portal_moonrock.trans: 哇，甚至看不到焊接接头。

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: It doesn't look like he has a care in the world.

trailmix.en: All the energy you need for a long day at work.
trailmix.trans: 一整天工作所需的能量。

woodcarvedhat.en: Gotta keep the old noggin' safe on the work site.
woodcarvedhat.trans: 必须保证工作现场的老家伙的安全。

brush.trans: 重复的任务可以舒缓人心。

houndstooth_blowpipe.en: Shoots dog teeth? What will they think of next?

spoiled_food.en: Wouldn't touch that with a ten foot pole.
spoiled_food.trans: 用三米长的杆子去碰它我都不要。

sentryward.en: Someone's got their eye on me.

generic.en: This one just might hatch.
generic.trans: 这枚蛋也许要孵出什么东西了。

long.en: You've got your work cut out for ya, lil guy.
long.trans: 你找到了正适合你的工作，小家伙。

generic.en: It ain't the end.

critter_puppy.en: Pups love you no matter who you are.
critter_puppy.trans: 不管你是谁，狗狗总是很喜欢你。

sleep.en: Not a bad result considering the materials.
sleep.trans: 原料那么一般，做成这样算不错了。

off.en: Gotta hook it up to the generator.

generic.en: Not a bad result considering the materials.
generic.trans: 原料那么一般，做成这样算不错了。

skeleton_notplayer.en: Rest in peace, whatever you were.
skeleton_notplayer.trans: 虽然闹不清你们生前是谁，但请安息吧。

wendy_resurrectiongrave.en: Here lies... another crack at it.

pepper.en: Ye-hooo! They gotta a kick to 'em.
pepper.trans: 耶呼！这个东西味道很足。

slingshotammo_moonglass.trans: 哼哼。手工制作的。形状都是不规则的。

walking_stick.en: Woodie and Lucy really stick together, huh?
walking_stick.trans: 伍迪和露西真的很团结，是吧？

furtuft.trans: 好想把它用作我的工作靴的内里。

polly_rogers.en: Nice to have a little extra help around here.
polly_rogers.trans: 很高兴能在这里得到一点额外的帮助。

perd.en: The light's on but no one's home.

construction1.en: Feels kinda like old times back at the factory.
construction1.trans: 感觉又回到了工厂的那些日子。

construction2.en: Well, it's not shaping up to be a portal. I was hopin' the boss had figured out a way back...
construction2.trans: 看起来不像是传送门。我本来希望老板能鼓捣出一个回去的办法……

generic.en: Wonder what the boss is gonna use all this energy for?
generic.trans: 你觉得老板会用这些能量做什么呢？

chesspiece_beequeen.en: I wonder if I could sculpt a hat like that.
chesspiece_beequeen.trans: 不知道我能不能雕刻一顶这样的帽子。

generic.en: Might as well see where the trail leads.
generic.trans: 看看这条小路会通向哪里。

batnosehat.en: Pretty practical if you ask me.
batnosehat.trans: 你问我意见的话，我会说很实用。

saddle_race.en: Still wouldn't keep up with a Leapin' Lena...

trident.en: I ain't afraid to make waves! Ha!

pumpkincookie.trans: 有时候也要宠爱一下自己，不是吗？

moonrockcrater.en: A rock with a hole in it.
moonrockcrater.trans: 一块中间有个洞的石头。

book_gardening.en: I prefer to learn from experience.
book_gardening.trans: 我更喜欢在实践中学习。

reviving.trans: 为什么它就不一直死着呢？

generic.en: Dead-er than a doornail.

gingerbreadhouse.en: Better as a dessert than a dwelling.
gingerbreadhouse.trans: 当甜点比当房子要好点。

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: I'm all for using the materials you've got.

quagmire_altar_statue1.en: It probably looked real nice once.

turf_beard_rug.en: That's sure makin' do with what you have.

merm_toolshed.en: I know a toolshed when I see one.
merm_toolshed.trans: 我一看就知道这是工具棚。

generic.en: Inventions? What sort of inventions?

shadow_forge_kit.en: Just needs a bit of elbow grease.

unhappy.en: That is not a happy monster.

veryhappy.en: Looks like we're safe for awhile.

generic.en: How's the weather up there?

monkeypillar.trans: 看起来很劣质，但不知为何很稳定。

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: Looks like a set of instructions, I should try putting a few together.
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 看起来像是操作指南，我应该试着组装一下。

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: Looks like a set of instructions, I should try putting a few together.
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 看起来像是操作指南，我应该试着组装一下。

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: I'm gonna be a real slugger with that thing!
lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.trans: 那个东西能大大加强我的打击力！

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: Looks like a set of instructions, I should try putting a few together.
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 看起来像是操作指南，我应该试着组装一下。

wx78_moduleremover.en: Sheesh, they could just ask for my help!

vault_rune.en: Ain't a chance I can read that!

weed_ivy.en: I don't like the look of that one.
weed_ivy.trans: 我不喜欢那个东西的样子。

goldenpickaxe.en: A shiny way to smash up rocks.

inactive.en: What on earth is that thing?

active.en: I can't begin to imagine how it works.
active.trans: 我无法想象它的工作原理是什么。

handpillow_kelp.en: It wouldn't be my first choice of pillow stuffing.
handpillow_kelp.trans: 它不会是我首选的枕头填充物。

trap.en: All the trappings of a good dinner. Ha!
trap.trans: 一切陷阱都是为了晚饭。哈！

ruinshat.en: Transforms the wearer into the "King of Snoot".
ruinshat.trans: 戴着它会变成“傲慢之王”。

quagmire_berrybush.trans: 那簇灌木丛里什么都没有了。

ghostlyelixir_shield.en: I don't think that's safe to drink...

generic.en: It's huge!
A fine lookin' torch.

halloweenpotion_fire_fx.trans: 噢。这个可以制造出火花。

twigs.en: I could snap these like twigs! Ha!
twigs.trans: 我轻轻一折就能掰断！哈！

yotb.en: Wait until the judge get's a load of you!
yotb.trans: 等会儿让评委好好看看你！

generic.en: Well, aren't you a cutie!

cactus_meat.en: It's got a sharp taste. Ha!

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: Hmph. Handmade. The shape's all irregular.
slingshotammo_gelblob.trans: 哼哼。手工制作的。形状都是不规则的。

deck_of_cards.en: Remember when you'd always knock down my house of cards?
deck_of_cards.trans: 还记得你以前总爱推倒我的纸牌屋吗？

atrium_key.en: Some sort of old power source.

pocketwatch_dismantler.en: Wish I'd had the chance to grab some of my tools before I got here.
pocketwatch_dismantler.trans: 要是我来之前有机会拿一些我自己的工具就好了。

balloonvest.en: I think he's trying to be helpful... in his own way.
balloonvest.trans: 我想他在用自己的方式……帮大家。

line_1.en: There's a picture on it of some strangely shaped people.

line_2.en: Can't make heads or tails of this picture.

line_5.en: A picture of a beautiful, well engineered city.
line_5.trans: 画的是一座美丽而设计巧妙的城市。

line_3.en: The people are drowning in axle grease.
line_3.trans: 一群人被润滑油淹没了。

line_4.en: Yuck. Something grotesque is happening in this picture.

off.trans: 应该有什么方法可以启动。

on.en: Not sure I trust strange portals anymore.

abandoned.trans: 世上哪有啥能一直挺着。

generic.en: Oh that's real pretty.

burning.en: I coulda built something with that.

generic.en: She ain't bothering no one.

charlierose.en: Oh, Charlie. What are you gettin' me into now?

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: That was one ornery son of a beast.
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 这真是一头暴躁的野兽。

carnival_vest_c.en: It's actually pretty practical for keepin' cool on hot summer days.
carnival_vest_c.trans: 炎热的夏天里相当实用，可以保持凉爽。

carnival_vest_b.en: Surprisingly well made, considering it was made by birds.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 考虑到它是由鸟类制作的，能做到这样已经很不容易了。

merm_lunar.en: You're a rather prickly one, ain't ya?
merm_lunar.trans: 知道你不好惹，没说错吧？

growing.en: Huh, I wonder why they grow like that?
growing.trans: 哈，他们为什么长这样呢？

mined_out.en: Ain't nothin left of that one.

generic.en: Now that's just unsettlin'.
generic.trans: 这些东西让人紧张不安。

book_bees.en: I can't read when there's work to do!

generic.en: Yep. Definitely a tree.
That thing don't look right.

quagmire_turnip_seeds.en: I got no idea what they'd grow into.

gazpacho.trans: 我绝对不会拒绝如此美味！

turf_mud.en: That's a chunk of muddy ground.

hound.en: Anyone got some rolled up newspaper?

firestarter.en: How'd that monkey manage to start a fire?!
firestarter.trans: 那只猴子怎么会生火？

ghost.en: Got yourself in quite the mess now didn'tcha?
ghost.trans: 现在把自己搞得一团糟了，不是吗？

murderer.en: Yikes, guess yer a wild animal after all.
murderer.trans: 呀，看来你终究还是野兽。

reviver.trans: 你是一只有用的猴子，不是吗？

generic.en: What a sweet lil monkey.

wx78module_maxhealth.en: WX, you gotta stop leavin' this stuff lying around!
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: WX，你以后可别再乱丢这些东西了！

generic.en: You're a big guy, hey?

mask_queenhat.en: Why do I feel like it's lookin' at me?
mask_queenhat.trans: 为什么我觉得它在看我？

quagmire_rubble_chimney.en: It's broken. I can't fix it.

yotb_post_item.en: Better roll up my sleeves and get building!

inspectself.trans: 那个漂亮的姑娘是谁呀？

slurtle_shellpieces.en: Broke, but I might salvage something useful.

klaus.en: Get out of here ya big creep.
klaus.trans: 滚出去，你这个可怕的家伙。

fused_shadeling.en: I don't like the look of those chompers.
fused_shadeling.trans: 我不喜欢那些狰狞的牙齿。

glassed.en: Why do I get the feeling something's watchin' me...
glassed.trans: 为什么我感觉有东西在看着我？

cave.en: It was impractical to build this here.

generic.en: Must be broke. I can still see the moon.
generic.trans: 肯定坏了，我还能看得到月亮。

archive_security_pulse.en: Just where do you think you're going?

generic.en: Probably a whole lot of interesting gears in there.
generic.trans: 里面应该有不少有趣的机关。

tomato_oversized.en: You could make a lot of spaghetti with that.
tomato_oversized.trans: 你可以用它做很多意大利面条。

thulecite.en: I love working with new materials.

quagmire_rubble_roof.en: I've repaired roofs before but this is a lost cause.
quagmire_rubble_roof.trans: 我以前也修过屋顶，但这修不了了。

quagmire_rubble_clock.en: Something muddled this clockwork real good.
quagmire_rubble_clock.trans: 什么东西把这座时钟整惨了。

quagmire_rubble_carriage.en: Never thought I'd say this, but it's beyond repair.
quagmire_rubble_carriage.trans: 我没想到我会这样说，但这个确实修不了了。

quagmire_altar_ivy.en: That stuff can ruin good architecture.

generic.en: Gnarly little bush.

quagmire_grill_small.en: Big enough for a small cookout.

generic.en: That's some good, workable material there.
generic.trans: 这些材料非常好，可以拿来用。

generic.en: Putting the tent together is the best part of camping.
generic.trans: 野营最好玩的地方就是把帐篷支起来。

boat_grass_item.en: Don't expect to build somethin' that's gonna last with cheap materials.
boat_grass_item.trans: 既然用了廉价的材料就别指望能造出持久的东西。

moonglassaxe.en: Anything to make gettin' firewood easier.

bodypillow_petals.en: Way too flimsy, there's no support at all!
bodypillow_petals.trans: 太脆弱了，完全没有支撑力！

giftwrap.en: I could wrap stuff up real nice.
giftwrap.trans: 我可以把东西包得漂漂亮亮的。

feather_robin_winter.en: If only I had a cap to put it in.
feather_robin_winter.trans: 要是我有顶帽子来配这个就好了。

carnivaldecor_plant_kit.en: I'll have that set up in a jiffy.

moon_cap_cooked.en: Wouldn't have minded having some of these around when I was pulling overtime.
moon_cap_cooked.trans: 我加班的时候有这个就好了。

quagmire_potato_cooked.en: I've always been a meat and potatoes gal.
quagmire_potato_cooked.trans: 本姑娘一直爱吃肉和土豆。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.en: Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 嗷，沃尔特还真是个小匠人。

barnacle_cooked.en: They're kinda chewier than I expected.
barnacle_cooked.trans: 它们比我想象的要有嚼劲。

dreadstone_stack.en: Must be a lot of the stuff growing down there.
dreadstone_stack.trans: 下面一定长了很多东西。

klaus_sack.en: There's gotta be something good in there.
klaus_sack.trans: 里面肯定有什么好东西。

generic.en: That looks mighty tasty.

eyemaskhat.en: Guess I'll really be seein' the world through different eyes.
eyemaskhat.trans: 这是真的让我用全新的眼睛来看世界了。

wx78module_bee.en: They've really gotta start takin' better care of themselves.
wx78module_bee.trans: TA真该学学怎么照顾好自己了。

turf_fungus.en: That's a chunk of weird ground.

quagmire_syrup.en: It's like honey from a tree.
quagmire_syrup.trans: 它就像是树木分泌的蜂蜜。

lightbulb.en: Not at all like the lightbulbs I'm used to.
lightbulb.trans: 完全不像我平常看到的灯泡。

locked.en: My lockpicking skills are a bit rusty.
locked.trans: 我的开锁技术有点生锈了。

generic.en: Wouldn't mind a peek inside.

chopped.trans: 浮木是不是好的建材呢？

burnt.en: Looks like there was an accident here.

mask_dollbrokenhat.en: Why do I feel like it's lookin' at me?
mask_dollbrokenhat.trans: 为什么我觉得它在看我？

yots_worm.en: Them worms came dressed to party.

ghost.en: That is not a good look on you, %s.

firestarter.en: Haven't we lost enough to fires, %s?
firestarter.trans: %s，我们被烧掉的东西还不够多吗？

murderer.en: Pfft! I'd never murder so openly!

attacker.trans: 噢，我非得把你拆了不可。

generic.en: That's a good lookin' gal!
generic.trans: 那个姑娘看起来真不赖！

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.en: Better roll up my sleeves and get started!

pomegranate.en: Eat that and you're stuck here forever!

sharkboi.en: You picked the wrong gal to mess with!
sharkboi.trans: 别小看我，我可不是柔弱的姑娘！

werepig.en: I have no idea what's going on!
werepig.trans: 我完全不知道怎么回事！

dead.en: That threw a wrench into his plans.
dead.trans: 看来他的计划完不成了。

generic.en: Hey there, ya lug!

fossil_piece.en: No bones about it, that's a fossil. Ha!

on.en: It lights up, even without filament.

ready.en: I guess it wants the Voxola?

generic.en: Just like in the bossman's workshop.
generic.trans: 就跟在老板的车间里时一样。

unlocked.en: At least I assembled it right.

shroombait.en: I can't make heads or tails out of it.

scrap_monoclehat.en: The bossman always said you gotta "see the bigger picture."
scrap_monoclehat.trans: 老板总喜欢讲，你得“眼观全局”。

oldlight.en: That's not gonna last much longer.

generic.en: Pretty sure this one won't move.

empty.en: Sturdily built.

shark.en: Just give 'em a good bop on the nose!
shark.trans: 只要在他们鼻子上好好敲一下就好了！

wagstaff_npc.en: Mr. Wagstaff! Is that really you?
wagstaff_npc.trans: 瓦格斯塔夫先生！真的是你啊？

armor_bramble.en: Odd design. How do you wear it without pricking yourself?
armor_bramble.trans: 古怪的设计。怎么穿才能不刺伤自己呢？

boat_ancient_item.en: They sure don't build 'em like they used to.
boat_ancient_item.trans: 现在的东西质量根本比不上从前。

dumbbell_marble.en: Awful fancy for something you just pick up and put down over and over.
dumbbell_marble.trans: 就是个反复拿起和放下的东西，弄这么花哨干啥。

anchor.en: That'll keep the boat right where we want it.
anchor.trans: 它会把船固定在我们想的地方。

leafymeatburger.en: It's not like any burger I've ever tried.
leafymeatburger.trans: 这和我试过的任何汉堡都不一样。

generic.en: It runs on "magic" instead of electricity.

chesspiece_guardianphase3.en: A little too lifelike for my comfort.
chesspiece_guardianphase3.trans: 逼真得有点让我不舒服了。

eyeplant.en: Y'know? I'm not even gonna ask.
eyeplant.trans: 你猜怎么着？我都懒得问了。

fish_cooked.en: I hate picking bones outta my teeth.
fish_cooked.trans: 我讨厌从牙缝里挑鱼刺。

healingstaff.en: I'm a bit of a Jane-of-all-trades.

growing.en: I swear that thing's gotten bigger.

generic.en: Sticky. I'd rather not walk on it.
generic.trans: 粘乎乎的。我可不想走在上面。

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: Gotta work before you can play.

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: You work with the materials you've got out here.
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 在这就是有什么材料就用什么材料。

stalker_minion.en: I don't want that anywhere near me!
stalker_minion.trans: 我不想那个东西接近我！

ruins_bat.trans: 这个铥矿做的玩意真是太棒了！

moonstorm_static_item.en: The boss really does have a gadget for everything.
moonstorm_static_item.trans: 老板真的什么工具都有。

generic.en: Urgh! What's wrong with it??

held.en: Aw, I can't stay mad at you.

generic.en: Yer an orange nuisance, aintcha?
generic.trans: 你是个橙色的小麻烦，是不是啊？

lore2.en: Someone used up the whole can of bug spray.
lore2.trans: 有人用完了整罐杀虫剂。

lore3.en: They sure don't want nobody leavin'.
lore3.trans: 那股力量不想让任何人离开。

lore1.en: It's like he sprung some sorta demonic oil leak.
lore1.trans: 他像是遭遇了某种恶魔般的漏油事件。

rock_moon.en: Seems like just another rock to me.
rock_moon.trans: 在我看来，只不过是另一块石头。

anchor_item.en: Someone's gotta assemble this anchor, might as well be me.
anchor_item.trans: 总要有人组装锚，就让我来吧。

yellowgem.en: I like gems best before they're cut.
yellowgem.trans: 我更喜欢没有切割成型的宝石。

charlie_lecturn.en: Everyone's got their part to play, huh?
charlie_lecturn.trans: 每个人都有自己的角色要演，对吧？

male_puppet.en: He doesn't look none too happy.

atrium_overgrowth.en: Don't think it's supposed to look like that.
atrium_overgrowth.trans: 我觉得它不应该是那个样子的。

inspectaclesbox.en: Sure hope the bossman doesn't mind me borrowing a few things.
inspectaclesbox.trans: 希望老板不会介意我借用点儿东西。

berries_cooked.en: A bit charred in places, but I don't mind.
berries_cooked.trans: 有点烧焦了，但我不介意。

spiderqueen.en: Better stay out of her way.

mushtree_moon.en: Now that's a weird looking mushroom.
mushtree_moon.trans: 那只蘑菇看起来好奇怪。

tacklestation.en: Need the right tool for the job!
tacklestation.trans: 要干好活，就得有好工具！

generic.en: It's a plant.

hammer_mjolnir.en: I'm most effective with a tool in hand.
hammer_mjolnir.trans: 手里有工具，效率自然高。

quagmire_turnip_cooked.en: I'd rather not eat them on their own.

winona_holotelepad.en: Looks like one of the boss's old designs. I should give it a scan.
winona_holotelepad.trans: 看起来像是老板做的旧设计。我应该扫描一下它。

inert.en: The foundation doesn't look very stable.

generic.en: Looks like he thinks he's the boss around here.
generic.trans: 看来他觉得在这他说的算。

starving.en: Stop whining, I'll feed you when I can!
starving.trans: 别哼哼了，我有空就会喂你的！

generic.en: We all go through that awkward stage.
generic.trans: 我们都经历过那段尴尬的时期。

sleeping.trans: 好好睡吧，腼腆的小毛球。

greenmooneye.en: You coulda been a useful necklace.
greenmooneye.trans: 你可以成为有用的项链。

krampus_sack.en: I could carry a whole warehouse in that thing!

held.en: Never hurts to have extra light.
held.trans: 多一些亮光总不是坏事。

generic.en: I've breathed in worse stuff at work.
generic.trans: 我在空气更糟糕的环境中干过活。

hiding.en: Why's this table givin' me the creeps?
hiding.trans: 为什么这张桌子让我有些毛骨悚然？

rock_avocado_fruit_ripe_cooked.en: Who knew rocks were so tasty looking inside?
rock_avocado_fruit_ripe_cooked.trans: 谁料到石头瓤这么好吃？

robot_blueprint.en: Now this one I can do!

mask_dollhat.en: Why do I feel like it's lookin' at me?
mask_dollhat.trans: 为什么我觉得它在看我？

slurtleslime.en: I hock those up after a long day at the factory.
slurtleslime.trans: 在工厂上完一天班后，我就能咳出这些东西。

gingerbreadwarg.en: This guy's just making me hungry.
gingerbreadwarg.trans: 这个家伙让我饥肠辘辘的。

halloweencandy_1.en: A nice change from baked apples.

generic.en: At least we found some use for that muck.
generic.trans: 至少我们发现了这些垃圾的一些用处。

full.en: And just like that, I ain't hungry no more.

recharging.en: Doesn't look like it's in working condition right now.
recharging.trans: 现在看起来不像是在工作状态。

generic.en: I wouldn't mind takin' a look at its inner workings.
generic.trans: 我愿意看一下它的内部结构。

halloweencandy_5.trans: 谢天谢地，不是用浣猫做的。

halloweencandy_6.en: Not sure anyone should eat those.
halloweencandy_6.trans: 我不确定这东西可以给人吃。

wx78module_music.en: Hey WX, if you're needin' a charge, just let me know!

hungry.trans: 让我们把你喂得肥肥的。

starving.en: You need some meat on those bones. Do you have bones?
starving.trans: 你都饿成皮包骨了。你有骨头吗？

generic.en: Seems friendly enough.

salty_doghat.en: Wonder what critter that tail belonged to.
salty_doghat.trans: 不知道这尾巴原来是哪只小动物的。

blueamulet.en: Now I don't have to take breaks to cool off.
blueamulet.trans: 现在我不用停下来等冷却了。

bushhat.en: Just, y'know. Strap a bush on your head.

cookiecutterhat.en: Hardhats must be worn beyond this point!
cookiecutterhat.trans: 进入危险区域，必须佩戴安全帽！

bootleg.en: Guess I'd better shake a leg. Ha!

lightcrab.en: I guess crabs can glow now, huh?
lightcrab.trans: 所以螃蟹现在也可以发光了，是吗？

moon_fissure_plugged.en: That old lady's more resourceful than I gave her credit for.

wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: Aw, she made a lil' shadow wand thing.

generic.en: Handmade, so you know it's not up to snuff.
generic.trans: 手工制作，所以估计质量不会太好。

burnt.en: Hope there was nothin' good inside.
burnt.trans: 希望里面没什么好东西。

winona_recipescanner.en: One scan with this Calibrated Perceiver, and I'll know how somethin's built!
winona_recipescanner.trans: 只要用这个校准观察机扫描一下，我就知道东西是怎么造出来的了！

generic.en: Sorry, Charlie.

off.en: Gotta hook it up to the generator.

gestalt.en: I feel like... they've seen my sister.
gestalt.trans: 我感觉...他们见过我的姐妹。

critter_lunarmothling.en: You sure are fragile, aren'tcha lil fella?

quagmire_pot_small.en: I only ever made stew before this.
quagmire_pot_small.trans: 我以前从没做过炖肉菜。

phonograph.en: Nothin' like some music to get through the workday faster.
phonograph.trans: 没有什么能像音乐一样帮你快速渡过工作日了。

halloween_ornament_2.trans: 我应该把它挂到某个地方。

rat.en: I think yer gettin' the hang of this, little guy!
rat.trans: 你逐渐驾轻就熟了，小家伙！

generic.en: Now that's a nifty little contraption.

burnt.en: Guess it was really feelin' the burn. Ha!

lunarthrall_plant.en: It thinks this is its turf!

halloween_ornament_5.trans: 嘿，是那些可以挂的家伙。

halloween_ornament_6.en: It needs to be in a tree.

costume_princess_body.en: Hmm. Think it works together with the mask.

generic.en: I feel luckier already.
generic.trans: 我已经感觉到好运降临了。

empty.en: We oughta put a bush in there.

webber_spider_minion.en: Can you tell your friends not to get so close to me, kid?

cutreeds.en: Doesn't hold a candle to steel pipe.

pinecone_sapling.en: It can handle itself from here.

ancient_statue.en: I'd never wanna meet one in person.
ancient_statue.trans: 我可不想真正遇到一个。

burnt.en: Guess it was really feelin' the burn. Ha!

generic.en: Better start training.

book_moon.en: At this point, I wish I knew less about the moon.
book_moon.trans: 我现在宁愿对月亮了解的少一点。

shadowdigger.trans: 麦斯威尔，懒得连自己份内的事都不想干了吗？

generic.en: Anything good in there, ya think?
generic.trans: 你觉得里面有没有什么好东西？

goatmilk.en: I'm a growing gal, you know!

lunarplanthat.en: It should keep my noggin' nice and safe.
lunarplanthat.trans: 它应该能使我的大脑保持安全。

turfcraftingstation.trans: 地砖一定要压瓷实喽！哈！

locked.en: Still needs a bit of tinkering.

generic.en: That gadget has my name on it.
generic.trans: 那件装置上有我的名字。

chesspiece_toadstool.en: I built a stool once but it didn't look like that.

spice_sugar.en: Now all I need is some pancakes to pour this over.
spice_sugar.trans: 就差几块煎饼把这些撒上去了。

tallbirdegg.en: You wanna be an omelet, don'tcha?

generic.en: Check out the peepers on this guy.
generic.trans: 快来看看这家伙身上的眼睛。

greenamulet.en: We could be good friends, you and I.
greenamulet.trans: 我们会成为好朋友的，你和我。

otter.trans: 真是个讨厌的小囤积者。

armorwood.en: Punch me! It does nothing! Ha!
armorwood.trans: 锤我一拳吧！挠痒一样！哈哈！

shadow_forge.en: Might as well put the shadows to work.
shadow_forge.trans: 不妨让暗影们也上上工。

chesspiece_kitcoon.en: I can't tell if this a great feat of engineering or a very stupid one. Either way, it sure is cute.
chesspiece_kitcoon.trans: 我不知道这是一个伟大的工程壮举还是一个非常愚蠢的行为。不管怎样，它确实很可爱。

quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.en: It's a big lump of cooked crab.

watermelon.trans: 我们以前总是靠它们来解暑。

chesspiece_bearger.en: Y'got a mean mug there, buddy.
chesspiece_bearger.trans: 你那杯子挺不错的，兄弟。

crabking_cannontower.en: There's no way they've got a permit for that.

portabletent_item.en: Need any help settin' that up?

dug_berrybush.en: I love getting my hands dirty.

moonglass_rock.en: Wonder if it's got any special properties.
moonglass_rock.trans: 不知道有没有什么特殊属性。

scraphat.trans: 这才是一顶工业强度的硬头盔！

generic.en: I'll take this as a sign.

ghost.en: Stop whinin', %s, it's just a scratch!

firestarter.en: You better not have singed any of my projects, scientist.
firestarter.trans: 你最好没有烧掉我的计划项目，科学家。

murderer.en: Mad scientist! Get'em!
murderer.trans: 疯子科学家！抓住他！

reviver.trans: 科学家先生，你是个好人。

generic.en: Hey %s! How ya doin'?

quagmire_goatmilk.en: I try to support local artisans.
quagmire_goatmilk.trans: 我尽量支持本地的手艺人。

quagmire_wheat_seeds.en: I got no idea what they'd grow into.
quagmire_wheat_seeds.trans: 我完全不知道它们会长成什么。

remains_glommerflower.en: Burnt bits of big ol' buzzer.

remains_thingie.en: That was a... Y'know! A thing.
remains_thingie.trans: 那是……你懂的！一个什么东西。

generic.en: Sooty.
Always be inventing.

leafymeatsouffle.trans: 好吧……我想这是有创意的。

stuffing.en: I could eat this for days!

missingskill.en: Interesting design, but above my pay grade...
missingskill.trans: 有趣的设计，但是以我的工资负担不起......

generic.en: Sure beats luggin' stuff around!
generic.trans: 肯定比拖着东西到处跑强！

off.en: I'd better hook it up to some power.

seastack.en: It's a big rock in the middle of nowhere.

cookedmonstermeat.en: It's still purple in the middle.

generic.en: A bit snooty.

eyeofterror_mini.en: Can't fault them for doing their job with the big overseer right there.
eyeofterror_mini.trans: 有那么大一个监工在，这些家伙也只好奉命行事。

aboveground.en: Taking a break from the mines?

cutstone.en: Prepped and ready for the assembly line.
cutstone.trans: 准备妥当，可以用来造东西了。

alterguardian_phase2spike.en: Some pretty slap-dash construction work, if you ask me.

saltbox.trans: 这个会让食物放的更久。

ghostlyelixir_revive.en: I don't think that's safe to drink...

turf_vault.en: That's a well made chunk of ground.

has_item.trans: 它和其他桌子没什么两样。

burnt.en: A shame to see that craftsmanship go to waste.
burnt.trans: 看到工艺被浪费，真是太可惜了。

generic.en: I don't care if it's fancy, just solidly built.
generic.trans: 高级不高级我不在乎，我关心结实不结实。

icecream.en: Y'gotta eat it before it melts.
icecream.trans: 趁它化掉之前赶紧吃了。

held.en: Hauling you around is murder on the feet! Ha!
held.trans: 带着你到处走，脚真受累！哈！

generic.en: Looks a bit flighty. Ha!

treasurechest_trap.en: I don't need to be concerned about that.
treasurechest_trap.trans: 我完全不需要担心那个。

burning.en: Not much I can do now.

diseasing.en: Yeuch! Is it supposed to smell like that?
diseasing.trans: 嗯啊，本来闻起来就是那味道吗？

picked.trans: 已经被摘得干干净净了。

diseased.en: Maybe you oughta take a sick day...

generic.en: Looks tasty. Hope they're not poison.
generic.trans: 看起来很好吃，希望没毒。

barren.trans: 是施肥过头还是没施肥？

sleepbomb.en: An unethical weapon, plain and simple.
sleepbomb.trans: 简单来说，这是个不道德的武器。

carnival_ball.en: You can't beat a good old rubber ball.
carnival_ball.trans: 你还是不如老式的橡胶球好。

generic.en: Never seen such a clear lake before.
generic.trans: 从没见过这么清澈的湖水。

empty.en: There used to be water there.

sword_lunarplant.en: It's a cut above most other swords I've seen. Ha!
sword_lunarplant.trans: 它比我见过的其他剑都厉害。哈!

yotb.en: Wait until the judge get's a load of you!
yotb.trans: 等会儿让评委好好看看你！

generic.en: Well, aren't you a cutie!

voidclothhat.en: Some folks think it's safer to be kept in the dark.
voidclothhat.trans: 有些人认为被蒙在鼓里会更有安全感。

bird_mutant.en: That bird gives me the creeps.

jammypreserves.en: The sweet taste of good planning.

lobsterdinner.en: That's some pretty fancy lookin' grub!
lobsterdinner.trans: 这小虫子看起来真花哨！

generic.en: Why the long face?

shadowthrall_hands.en: What? Mad I left ya hanging?

lunarrift_portal.en: That tear's a bit beyond what my trusty tape can fix.
lunarrift_portal.trans: 裂得超出了我可靠的胶布所能修复的范围。

slingshotmodkit.en: Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer.
slingshotmodkit.trans: 嗷，沃尔特还真是个小匠人。

normal.en: About as cozy as it gets out here.

generic.en: It's the pits out here.

out.en: My sister was afraid of the dark.

koalefig_trunk.en: Looks like some really snooty food. Ha!

generic.en: It's... cold? Somehow?
Built nice and sturdy.

burnt.en: Just means we gotta build more.
burnt.trans: 意味着我们得再造更多。

glasscutter.en: Ha ha! Just try and fight me!
glasscutter.trans: 哈哈！看看谁还敢跟我打！

wet.en: I'd guess there's a bit too much water in there.

dry.en: Looks a bit dry to me.

generic.en: It's dirty work, but somebody's got to do it.
generic.trans: 这是个脏活，但总得有人去做。

burnt.en: Guess I'll have to start from scratch.

turf_sandy.en: That's a chunk of sandy ground.

cattoy_mouse.en: I think it's got a squeaky wheel.
cattoy_mouse.trans: 它有一个吱吱作响的轮子。

lavaarena_keyhole.en: Can't go home without the key.

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: Extra protection's always good, 'specially on water.
boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 额外的保护总是好的，特别是在水上。

blue_cap_cooked.en: Well, I don't THINK it's poison.

lit.trans: 这是一座精心建造的雕像！

generic.en: Looks like the fire's outta fuel.

lit.trans: 上一点点润滑油脂，它就会看起来像新的一样。

generic.en: Looks like the fire's outta fuel.

lit.trans: 抛过光了现在闪闪发光！

generic.en: Looks like the fire's outta fuel.

battlesong_shadowaligned.en: Opera's a bit hoity-toity for me.
battlesong_shadowaligned.trans: 歌剧是那些势利眼才喜欢的东西。

dumbbell.en: Why not do some real work instead of just liftin' these things?
dumbbell.trans: 与其举这些东西，为什么不做一些真正的工作？

chester.trans: 谁是最可爱的小工具箱呀？

missingskill.en: Interesting design, but above my pay grade...
missingskill.trans: 有趣的设计，但是以我的工资负担不起......

charging.en: Needs some more time to charge.

off.en: Gotta hook it up to the generator.

generic.en: I made a few adjustments to the bossman's design.
generic.trans: 我调整了一下老板的设计。

grotto_pool_small.en: Fancy a swim? Ha! Didn't think so.

generic.en: It sure drives a hard bargain.

empty.en: So you want the good stuff, huh?

wall_stone_2.trans: 建造的部分已经完成了。

frozen.en: Brr! Like a chunk of ice.

generic.en: This is a good rock. A special rock.
generic.trans: 这是一块好石头，特别的石头。

bonesoup.en: Knocked it out of the park again, bucko.

otterden_dead.en: It was definitely holding it all together.

mutator_spitter.en: Hope those spiders have strong stomachs.

lureplantbulb.en: That is not a comforting texture!

on.en: Witness the efficiency of the future!

wx78module_maxsanity.en: WX, you gotta stop leavin' this stuff lying around!
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: WX，你以后可别再乱丢这些东西了！

quagmire_portal.en: I might not be good at rescue missions.

durian_oversized.en: It sure is making a big stink.

stale.en: This stuff sure takes a while to do its thing.

spoiled.en: That looks like some strong stuff.

generic.en: Looks tapped out.

oar.en: Remember, back straight, move those arms!

bernie_big.en: That girl knows how to put on a show.

garlic_seeds.en: I got no idea what they'd grow into.

has_item.trans: 里面好像有东西卡住了。

lavaarena_rechargerhat.en: I'd be so efficient with that!

bloom.en: Not a fan of the smell.

generic.en: I guess they grow better down here?

watermelonicle.en: A good treat for work breaks.
